title: My ML based BTC model that retrains itself beats BTC by many points, hundreds of thousands.
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
I’ve been running an ML-based BTC system live since September, and the main thing I’ve learned is that a good model does not need to trade constantly to stay effective, it just needs to have the ability and the system to adapt itself on newer market conditions.

My system retrains periodically on newer data, which helps it adapt to changing market conditions instead of relying on a fixed static edge. That matters in BTC because the market can shift from trending to choppy very quickly, and models that do not refresh tend to age badly.

A few stats from the 5-year backtest:

* Around 10% average monthly return on fixed lot.
* Sharpe above 3.
* CAGR around 56%.
* Stayed positive through the recent spot drawdown.
* Every single year in green, including the 2022 bear phase.

What I like most is that the model is selective. It waits for conditions that fit the setup, then acts only when the edge is actually there. In my view, that is a stronger approach than forcing more trades in an uncertain market.

The way I see it, this kind of system is less about predicting every BTC move and more about staying disciplined enough to capture the right ones over time. That is also why I trust it as a long-term systematic model rather than a short-term signal product.

I am looking to sell it to someone who can utilise this system cause I am not able to use this system at its potential because of capital drawback. I’m open to discussing access with someone who understands systematic trading and sees the value of a model that is designed to adapt rather than stay static.

This is the backtest data: [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xwNisxVslkfPPY9g2rcbWt4shrI-9o4-/view?usp=drive\_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xwNisxVslkfPPY9g2rcbWt4shrI-9o4-/view?usp=drive_link)
